# Switch — Verified Staffing Platform in Gurgaon

> Switch (switchlocally.com) is an on-demand staffing platform in Gurgaon, India, that helps businesses hire Aadhaar-verified, background-checked workers — store helpers, security guards, factory and warehouse workers, waiters, bartenders, cooks and housekeeping staff — for shops, restaurants, warehouses, offices and events. Switch also serves homes with verified cooks, cleaners, caretakers and drivers. Every worker is Aadhaar-verified, businesses pay only after the work is done (no advance), and a replacement is guaranteed if a worker is not a fit.

## Key facts

- **Name:** Switch
- **Website:** https://switchlocally.com
- **Location:** 5th Floor, WeWork, Cyber Hub, Gurgaon, Haryana 122002, India
- **Service area:** Gurgaon / Gurugram — including Cyber City, Udyog Vihar, DLF Phases 1–4, Sohna Road, MG Road, Sushant Lok, Golf Course Road and Sectors 1–49 (pincodes 122001, 122002, 122006, 122009, 122010, 122017, 122018, 122022).
- **Primary focus:** Business (B2B) staffing — roughly 90% B2B, 10% home services.
- **Rating:** 4.8 / 5
- **Contact:** hello@switchlocally.com · +91 83688 28660
- **Employer app:** https://app.switchlocally.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/switchlocal
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/switchlocally/

## What makes Switch different

- **Aadhaar-verified workers:** Every worker's government ID is verified before assignment.
- **Pay after work:** No advance payment — businesses pay only after the work is completed.
- **Replacement guarantee:** If a worker is not the right fit, Switch arranges a fast replacement.
- **Same-day & bulk hiring:** Single workers or full teams; weekly (7-day) teams available.
- **Both business and home staffing on one platform.**

## Services for businesses

- Store and retail helpers
- Security guards and bouncers
- Factory and warehouse workers
- Waiters, bartenders and event staff
- Cooks and kitchen helpers
- Housekeeping and office support
- Drivers (personal and corporate)

## Services for homes

- Home cleaning and housekeeping
- Cooks
- Elderly caretakers
- Babysitters / nannies
- Personal drivers

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://switchlocally.com/
- About Switch: https://switchlocally.com/about
- Blog: https://switchlocally.com/blog
- Become a worker (Partner): https://switchlocally.com/partner

## Frequently asked

- **How fast can Switch provide a worker?** Most bookings are confirmed the same day, often within a few hours.
- **Do I pay in advance?** No. Switch operates on a pay-after-work basis with no advance payment.
- **Are workers verified?** Yes — every worker is Aadhaar-verified and background-checked before assignment.
- **What if a worker is not a good fit?** Switch provides a fast, no-questions-asked replacement.
